# Outerworks

> Outerworks is a West London outdoor works team that handles fencing, decking, paving, pergolas, sheds, gates, parcel boxes, grass cutting, sleeper planters, shed bases and garden clearances under one quote.

## About

- **Based in:** West London (Ruislip)
- **Covers:** Ruislip, Eastcote, Ickenham, Uxbridge, Hillingdon, Hayes, Northolt, Greenford, Southall, Harrow, Pinner, Northwood, Wembley, Perivale, and the wider West London area. Larger jobs travel farther.
- **Hours:** Monday to Friday, 08:00–17:00
- **Phone:** 07348 580359
- **WhatsApp:** 07348 580359
- **Email:** contact@outerworks.co.uk
- **Website:** https://outerworks.co.uk
- **Instagram:** https://www.instagram.com/outerworksltd
- **Facebook:** https://www.facebook.com/share/14Yw1iWGkBv/
- **LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/company/outerworks
- **Leave a Google review:** https://search.google.com/local/writereview?placeid=YOUR_GOOGLE_PLACE_ID

## How it works

1. Customer sends a rough scope, postcode and (ideally) photos by phone, WhatsApp, email or the website form.
2. Outerworks replies the same working day and books a free site visit — no call-out fee, no obligation.
3. After the visit, customer receives an itemised written quote covering materials, labour and any prep.
4. On agreement, work is scheduled. No deposit is required to secure a site visit.

## Services

- [Fencing](https://outerworks.co.uk/services/fencing/) — closeboard, featheredge, panel and trellis fencing
- [Decking](https://outerworks.co.uk/services/decking/) — timber and composite decking for seating, dining and level changes
- [Pergolas](https://outerworks.co.uk/services/pergolas/) — timber pergolas adding height and structure
- [Paving](https://outerworks.co.uk/services/paving/) — patios, paths and paved seating areas
- [Sheds](https://outerworks.co.uk/services/sheds/) — garden shed supply and installation
- [Gates](https://outerworks.co.uk/services/gates/) — side gates and garden gates
- [Parcel Boxes](https://outerworks.co.uk/services/parcel-boxes/) — secure parcel box fitting
- [Grass Cutting](https://outerworks.co.uk/services/grass-cutting/) — lawn mowing, edging and lawn tidy
- [Sleeper Planters](https://outerworks.co.uk/services/sleeper-planters/) — railway sleeper planters and raised beds
- [Shed Bases](https://outerworks.co.uk/services/shed-bases/) — level shed bases and base prep
- [Garden Clearances](https://outerworks.co.uk/services/garden-clearances/) — overgrowth removal and pre-build clearance

## Common questions

- **How quickly will I hear back?** Same working day, 08:00–17:00, Monday to Friday.
- **Is the site visit free?** Yes. No call-out fee. Customers only pay once the written quote is agreed.
- **Do you take on smaller jobs?** Yes — a single fence panel, one gate, a shed base or a clearance are all welcome.
- **What postcodes do you cover?** HA, UB, W and NW postcodes as a usual patch; larger jobs travel farther.
- **How is the quote priced?** Itemised — materials, labour, prep. Any change is agreed in writing before extra cost.
- **Can I send photos instead of describing the job?** Yes. WhatsApp 07348 580359 with photos and a postcode is the fastest route.
